strings.settings.title: Ntọala
strings.settings.subtitle: Nhọrọ Ngwa
strings.lang.title: Asụsụ
strings.lang.intro: Asụsụ bụisi nọ naanị. Budata asụsụ gị maka ntụgharị zuru oke na-enweghị ịntanet — nkọwa, akụkọ ifo na ihe ndị ọzọ.
strings.lang.failed: Ibudata agwụla. Lelee njikọ gị ma nwalee ọzọ.
strings.settings.night.desc: Ọbara ọbara omimi na-echebe anya nke amụrụ ọchịchọ — ìhè ọbara ọbara na-enwe obere mmetụta na ịhụ n'abali.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: Na-aghọ ọbara ọbara ọtọmatik mgbe igwe jiri ọchịchọ mgbe anyanwụ rutere n'okpuru.
strings.settings.location.desc: Ebe a na-atụ ọnọdụ igwe maka ya.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Na-agụ ihe a na-achọ na nduzi n'olu ụda — maka ojiji na-enweghị aka na ndị na-enweghị ọhụụ.
strings.settings.fov.desc: Hazi obere ka ahịrị òtù kpakpando na ụzọ satlaiti guzobe n'igwe ezigbo.
strings.settings.about.credits: Arụpụtara ya na astronomy-engine, satellite.js & Celestrak.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.paywall.title: Meghe Igwe nile
strings.paywall.subtitle: Zụọ otu ugboro. Enweghị ndebanye aha n'ọnwa, enweghị akaụntụ — nke gị ruo mgbe ebighị ebi, zuru oke na-enweghị ịntanet.
strings.paywall.feature.favorites: Ihe a hụrụ n'anya na-enweghị oke
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Igwe Oge — hụ igwe n'ụbọchị ọ bụla
strings.paywall.feature.events: Ihe mere igwe — izọtọ, mmiri ozuzo kpakpando, njikọ
strings.paywall.feature.night: Ịhụ n'abali zuru oke (odo odo, ọtọ, ike)
strings.paywall.maybeLater: O nwere ike ka e mesịa
strings.paywall.comingSoon: A ga-emeghe ịzụ n'oge na-adịghị anya — jiri koodu imeghe ugbu a.
strings.paywall.error: Ihe bụ isi nọ ya. Nwalee ọzọ.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Họrọ ihe a na-achọ n'igwe
strings.stars.title: Kpakpando
strings.stars.subtitle: Kpakpando {n} nwere aha ndị kacha ọcha
strings.deepsky.title: Igwe Omimi
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Kpakpando {n}, nebula, galaxi na òtù
strings.constellations.title: Òtù Kpakpando
strings.constellations.subtitle: Ụdị kpakpando {n} a ma ama
strings.satellites.title: Satlaiti
strings.events.title: Ihe mere n'Igwe
strings.events.subtitle: Ihe ga-abịa — Kụọ iji gaa n'oge
strings.search.name: Chọọ n'aha…
strings.search.star: Chọọ kpakpando ma ọ bụ òtù…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: Enweghị ihe a hụrụ n'anya — Meghe ihe, kụọ ★ iji tinye.
strings.list.empty.visible: Enweghị ihe n'elu horizon ugbu a — Nwaa "Gosipụta Nile".
strings.list.empty.search: Enweghị ihe dabara na nchọ gị.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: Enweghị kpakpando n'ndepụta n'elu horizon ugbu a.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: Enweghị ihe igwe omimi n'elu horizon ugbu a.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: Enweghị otu n'ime òtù kpakpando ndị a n'elu horizon ugbu a.
strings.sat.overhead: ● A Hụ Ugbu A — Lelee n'elu!
strings.sat.overheadDay: Nọ n'elu ugbu a mana ọchịchọ
strings.sat.overheadShadow: Nọ n'elu ugbu a mana n'oge ụzọ
strings.sat.noPass: Enweghị ịgafe a ga-ahụ n'oge na-adịghị anya
strings.fav.empty:
Enweghị ihe a hụrụ n'anya.
Meghe mbara igwe ma ọ bụ kpakpando ọ bụla, kụọ ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: Enweghị otu n'ime ihe i hụrụ n'anya n'elu horizon ugbu a.
strings.fav.noMatch: Enweghị ihe a hụrụ n'anya dabara na nchọ gị.
strings.point.belowBanner: {name} nọ n'okpuru horizon — Lee n'okpuru site n'ụwa.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} anọghị n'elu ugbu a — Kụọ ọmụmụ maka ịgafe ọzọ.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ Njem Oge: {when} — Kụọ iji laghachi ugbu a
strings.point.permBody: Planet Pointer na-egosi akara nduzi n'elu vidiyo ka ozugbo iji gosipụta {name}.
strings.info.addFav: ☆  Tinye n'ime ihe a hụrụ n'anya
strings.info.passNote: Oge mpaghara. Ọdụdụ elu = ìhè, ịgafe dị mfe.
strings.ev.lunarSub: Onwa na-agafe n'oge ụzọ nke ụwa
strings.time.title: Igwe Oge
strings.time.subtitle: Hụ igwe n'ụbọchị ma ọ bụ oge ọ bụla.
